title: Feijoada Completa (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Add a splash of lime juice and a pinch of sea salt. Also add a dash of hot sauce and top with fresh cilantro.

source_review.text: Authentic and delicious! Added a splash of lime juice and a pinch of sea salt. Also added a dash of hot sauce and topped with fresh cilantro.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile of the dish with added acidity, heat, and freshness.

changes_made.to_text: Add a splash of lime juice and a pinch of sea salt. Also add a dash of hot sauce and top with fresh cilantro.

source_review.text: Used ham hocks instead of pork shoulder. Added extra bay leaves and a pinch of black pepper. Served with farofa.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User substituted pork shoulder with ham hocks for a different flavor profile.
